description: As more hunters arrive in the casino, Daisy springs into action to defend against them, while Simmons tries to negotiate with a security guard to let her search the cells for Fitz. Amidst the chaos, the two women are separated as Daisy fights and Simmons stumbles through her search, desperate to find Fitz before the hunters do.
location: Kitson (alien casino planet / House of Games)

transcript.line: This isn't helping. We need to find a way out of here or they're gonna skin us alive.
They can have my skin. I don't need it anymore. It is my uniform of shame.
You're not useless, Enoch, okay? You're not. So please, shut up and help me get thi... What is that smell?
The foul stench of the name Enoch.
No, it's coming from him. What is that?
He's a Crepetolian. Their blood is 75% sulfur.
Hey! I got him. Fire!
Okay. You go. I got it from here. Are you sure? Yeah. If I can't quake it, I'll break it.
Okay.
Go. Sorry, boys. It's ladies' night.
Whoo! Oh.
Why do I exist? I am nothing. I'm a speck of dust in the infinite.
Okay, Enoch...
An afterthought in the worm-ridden mind of the black void.
Okay. I'm gonna need you to spark up. So you take a break from being infinite nothing and do that for me?
Why would I do anything when there is no purpose? We will all soon be dust and rust.
'Cause you're my best friend. Remember? That's your purpose.
You're bluffing.
No. I'm not. I can't believe I'm saying this, because you are...
Chronicom. Decommissioned.
Gonna say a massive pain in the ass, but... You've grown on me. So, yeah. You are my best friend.
For you, my best friend, I would do anything.
Come on.
